label: M3: Genetic Programming
formula: mul(log(log(add(lym_pct, -0.247))), mul(div(neut_pct, mono_pct), mul(lym_pct, mul(mul(lym_pct, mul(div(neut_pct, mono_pct), mul(div(neut_pct, mono_pct), add(hgb, mono_pct)))), mul(div(neut_pct, mono_pct), add(hgb, mono_pct))))))

label: M5: Seeded GP
formula: div(sub(sub(sub(div(mono_pct, rbc), sqrt(div(mono_pct, rbc))), sqrt(add(mch, add(mch, add(mch, mcv))))), mch), add(mch, mcv))
